name: IPQualityScore
description: This app implements IP, URL and Email investigative capabilities utilizing IPQualityScore

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Email to query for reputation information

parameters.name: fast
parameters.description: Enables or disables SMTP check with the mail service provider

parameters.name: suggest_domain
parameters.description: Force analyze if the email address's domain has a typo and should be corrected to a popular mail service

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Maximum number of seconds to wait for a reply from a mail service provider

parameters.name: strictness
parameters.description: Sets how strictly spam traps and honeypots are detected by system (Possible Values: 0, 1 and 2)

parameters.name: abuse_strictness
parameters.description: Set the strictness level for machine learning pattern recognition of abusive email addresses

actions.name: Url Checker
actions.description: Queries IPQualityScore's malicious URL scanner API

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL to query for reputation information

parameters.name: strictness
parameters.description: How strict should we scan this URL? (Possible Values: 0, 1 and 2)

parameters.name: fast
parameters.description: The API will provide quicker response times using lighter checks and analysis when enabled. This setting defaults to "false"

actions.name: Ip Reputation
actions.description: Queries IPQualityScore's Proxy and VPN detection API

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: IP to query for reputation information

parameters.name: strictness
parameters.description: How in depth (strict) do you want this query to be? (Possible Values: 0, 1 and 2)

parameters.name: user_agent
parameters.description: Additional checks against bots

parameters.name: user_language
parameters.description: Additional risk evaluation

parameters.name: fast
parameters.description: Certain forensic checks are skipped

parameters.name: mobile
parameters.description: Specifies if this lookup should be treated as a mobile device

parameters.name: allow_public_access_points
parameters.description: Specifies if this lookup should be treated as a mobile device

parameters.name: lighter_penalties
parameters.description: Enable this setting to lower detection rates and Fraud Scores for mixed quality IP addresses

parameters.name: transaction_strictness
parameters.description: Adjusts the weights for penalties applied due to irregularities

parameters.name: phone
parameters.description: Phone Number you want to fetch reputation data

parameters.name: strictness
parameters.description: How in depth (strict) do you want this reputation check to be? Stricter checks may provide a higher false-positive rate. We recommend starting at "0", the lowest strictness setting, and increasing to "1" or "2" depending on your levels of fraud

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: You can optionally provide us with the default country or countries(comma separated) this phone number is suspected to be associated with. Our system will prefer to use a country on this list for verification or will require a country to be specified in the event the phone number is less than 10 digits

actions.name: Dark Web Leak
actions.description: Queries IPQualityScore's Dark Web Leak API

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of data you are submitting

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Indicator Value of the type
